name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: HIKEN – KATAWA JUUSHOU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: SECRETS – CRIPPLING INJURY)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, E, Mob

You imbue your Chakra Scalpel with a charge which enhances its next successful hit. The technique ends when all charges are used. Chakra Scalpel attacks deal 1d6 additional damage, and when you hit you can ex- pend a charge to try and damage a specific limb, which can be saved against. The following effects last 8 hours and can be applied twice (except head/neck):

- Arm: Target suffers a -1 penalty to attack and damage rolls.
- Leg: Target suffers a -1 penalty to Defense and Reflex saves, and its land movement speed is reduced by 5 ft.
- Torso: Target suffers a -2 penalty to Constitution checks and a -1 penalty to Fortitude saves.
- Head/Neck: Target is blinded for 1d3 hours.

The arm and leg debuffs can be healed as though they were 1 point of ability damage per debuff 'charge' (they count as the same type of ability damage). The torso damage counts as an exhaustion effect, which can only be removed by any ability that completely removes exhaustion (and not by any which merely turn it into fatigue).
